name: qa-executor
description: Portable QA execution plugin with a qa-executor skill for running or guiding approved QA test cases, enforcing guarded Plane.so QA workflow states, capturing evidence, producing execution_result JSON, incrementally updating source test case rows/items, syncing managed Plane.so summaries and optional Notion execution reports, and handing structured results to QA reporter and automation agents.

interface.shortDescription: Execute QA cases and capture evidence.
interface.longDescription: QA Executor provides a portable skill for normalizing planner-driven, manual, Plane.so, Notion, spreadsheet, or document test cases, resolving run policy scope, enforcing guarded Plane state workflow from Ready to Test through In Testing, Need Review Test Execute, Need Issue Report, and Ready to Report, executing API, UI, DB, hybrid, or manual-instruction checks, capturing redacted evidence, producing execution_result JSON, incrementally updating the original source row/item/section after each test case, embedding or uploading image evidence when supported, discovering Notion links from Plane, creating report pages/documents only when explicitly requested, keeping Plane output summary-only with source or report links, managing sync preflight policy and idempotency, managing OK/NOK execution review, and generating handoffs for qa-reporter and qa-automation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-executor to run or guide approved QA test cases, optionally sync managed Plane and Notion output with bridge links, and produce an execution result package.
